raw_request: It would be nice if lessons were available in podcast format
cleaned_request: Add podcast/audio mode for learning content
problem: Users want to consume learning material while commuting or multitasking
desired_outcome: More flexible learning experience accessible on-the-go
interview_context: User is willing to discuss commute-based and audio-first learning use cases.

raw_request: The ML Workbench is useful, but I wish there was a guided no-code path for business users
cleaned_request: Introduce a no-code guided workflow in ML Workbench for non-technical users
problem: Business users feel excluded from ML Workbench due to its technical complexity
desired_outcome: Ability for non-technical stakeholders to build and run simple ML experiments
interview_context: Has tried AutoML solutions in other platforms and can share comparative feedback.

raw_request: I need a way to bookmark datasets within the Data Challenges section so I can find them later
cleaned_request: Add dataset bookmarking feature to Data Challenges
problem: Analysts re-discover the same datasets manually every session
desired_outcome: Persistent bookmarks or favorites list for frequently accessed datasets
